---
title: "Teaching"
---

## Courses

### Epi 204: Regression Methods in Epidemiology

Lecture notes and materials for Epi 204 are available on GitHub:

- [Epi 204 Lecture Notes Repository](https://github.com/d-morrison/rme)

[View Teaching Evaluations](evals.qmd)

## Presentations

### Introduction to Causal Inference

Douglas Ezra Morrison, Ph.D. – January 19, 2022

<a href="https://health.ucdavis.edu/media-resources/ctsc/documents/pdfs/causal-inference-intro-2022.pdf">Presentation PDF</a> | <a href="https://ucdhs.hosted.panopto.com/Panopto/Pages/Viewer.aspx?id=43e9eb6f-3ed9-41ac-8ad9-ae22016572c8">Video</a> (42:18)
